title: The Left-Wing Case Against Antizionism
description: Discrimination against Israelis qua Israelis—and the “Zionists” who appear as their proxies—is a moral wrong.

description: If the president is infallible, there must be some other explanation for his Iran defeat.

description: The future of AI and jobs will be so much weirder than you think.
author: Lila Shroff

title: Iran Has Humiliated Trump
description: Officials in Tehran got the United States to sign a document that even Americans described as degrading, mortifying, a total capitulation.

description: TheAtlanticstaff writer Kaitlyn Tiffany and Jeffrey Goldberg,The Atlantic’s editor in chief, discuss Tiffany’s new book,The Housewives Underground: The Untold Story of the Women Who Made the JFK Assas

author: Elaine Godfrey

description: Nancy Pelosi on gerrymandering, the midterms, and her 39 years in Congress

description: Disclosure Daytreats extraterrestrial life as a challenge to faith. It’s not.

title: Photos: The Passion of World Cup Fans
description: The 2026 World Cup is under way, and fans around the world are gathering in stadiums, pubs, and even churches—both at home and in the three host countries—to cheer for their teams and ride the emotion

title: Cuba Is Collapsing. Will Trump Invade?
description: The CNN international correspondent Patrick Oppmann on Trump’s fixation on Cuba, the current state of the Cuban government, and what happens next. Plus: J. D. Vance’s presidential aspirations, andOthe

title: An Ascendant Constitutional Theory Is a Threat to American Science
description: The idea of a “unitary executive” is now being extended to America’s scientific establishment, with potentially devastating effects.
